releaseNotes: New: 'Don't split / Per sheet / Merged sheets / Separate files' output splitting with configurable rows-per-chunk. New: global dedup across all files & sheets, plus a 'GapReport' sheet listing every key with its source files and which files were missing it. UX: warnings for incompatible option combos (Global + In-place, Split + In-place, Gap report without dedup). Removed legacy sheet-name preset.
